citation.description: autouse _reset_config_cache fixture calls reset_config_cache() before and after every test, clearing _TOML_CACHE and _RESULT_CACHE so no stale resolved config leaks across tests

criteria.criterion: The 3 tests pass with a real ~/.config/rebar/config.toml present (robust isolation — clear the config cache per test, or scope the read through the XDG-isolated path).

citation.description: _clean_config_env autouse fixture sets XDG_CONFIG_HOME to an empty tmp_path dir (not delenv), with comment explicitly citing d716 fix. test_config_cli_json_output at line 206 checks user_config['exists'] is False against this isolated path.

criteria.criterion: test_config_show.py::test_config_cli_json_output — user_config['exists'] is False assertion is robust to host config

citation.description: test_sources_all_default_when_no_config relies on _clean_config_env (XDG_CONFIG_HOME -> empty dir) + _reset_config_cache to ensure no user config leaks

criteria.criterion: test_config_show.py::test_sources_all_default_when_no_config — all sources are 'default' assertion is robust to host config

citation.description: Module-level _clean_config_env autouse fixture sets XDG_CONFIG_HOME to empty tmp_path dir (not delenv), explicitly referencing d716 in comment. Combined with conftest _reset_config_cache, no host config leaks into test_deep_tree_walk_is_bounded.

criteria.criterion: test_config_perf.py::test_deep_tree_walk_is_bounded — bounded parse assertion is robust to host config

citation.description: The combination of autouse _reset_config_cache (clears cache before/after each test) + _isolate_user_config (sets XDG_CONFIG_HOME to empty dir) + module-level _clean_config_env in test_config_show and test_config_perf (does NOT delenv XDG, per d716 fix) provides the isolation needed to prevent real ~/.config/rebar/config.toml from leaking into any test.

criteria.criterion: `make test` is green on a machine that has ~/.config/rebar/config.toml
